title: calamagrostis lahulensis
intro: Calamagrostis lahulensis is a type of grass native to the Himalayan region, scientifically known as a species of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and reduce inflammation. It is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. In traditional medicine, Calamagrostis lahulensis is often prepared as a decoction, powder, or infusion for its medicinal uses.
